text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During summer camp, Kawakami Princess is in
even higher spirits than usual.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, it's our summer camp episode! You
know what that means, right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's the turning point in our story! We're about to
begin a new arc, so I need to train my body like
crazy to make sure I'm ready!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
With the Japanese Oaks behind us, all that's left
of the Tiara tour is the Shuka Sho. And then
comes the real main event of my classic year...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The battle to determine the true princess among
princesses—the Queen Elizabeth II Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A G1 race that we watched together previously.
The roster doesn't include just classic-year
Umamusume, either—those in their senior year
can also vie for the Queen's throne.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
After the brilliant sparkle of the Triple Tiara, I'll
have to compete against queens both new and
old to see who deserves this year's title.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's the perfect opportunity for me to go out there
and prove I'm a princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And then, I'll be celebrated by everyone, just like
Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Their cheers and applause will become my crown
of hope under which I'll shine like a light.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And in the final scene, when I face off against the
Dark Princess, I'll take the hand of my prince,
Legendary Trainer, and unleash my new special
move, United Ultra Light Beam!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll blast off into space, where I'll run in the
upcoming movie!
choice_data_list:
Aren't you just describing a Princess Fighter
episode now?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... Still... I think it's an important race on my
path to becoming a princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Defeat is not an option! If I'm going to enter, then
I have to claim first place!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
After all, a princess blows past all the foes who
stand in her way!
choice_data_list: Then you'll have to work hard during training.
Then you'll have to work hard during training.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Right! What should I start with?
choice_data_list: Let's do some power training by a waterfall.

Let's cross the ocean through sheer
determination.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's from the latest episode of Mighty Muscle! Princess Fighter! Princess Fighter undergoes grueling special training to improve her kicking power so she can defeat a rampaging water dragon!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hah! Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Huh?! There's already someone here?! Look at
how she's thrusting her fists at the waterfall basin.
What ferocity!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wait—Akebono, it's you! Are you here for some
special training, too?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Nope, not training—I'm fishing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The freshwater fish here make the perfect
ingredient for a delightfully buono acqua
pazza. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to knock the fish out by punching them
as they swim. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. So afterwards, you collect the fish
suffering from concussions!
choice_data_list: I've, uh, never heard of that fishing technique...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If they're only knocked out, that means they're
still alive! They'll be just as fresh as if they were
flopping around!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll help out too. These fish are about to be
introduced to my kicks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash! Crash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess and Hishi Akebono unleash
their attacks into the water one after another,
eventually knocking out around ten fish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono cooks up the fish they caught, and
the three of us enjoy a scrumptious meal
together.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: H-h-hold on!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's just like the red-hot training episode from
the first Princess Fighter series! The hellish
training session that caused Legendary Trainer to
see the River Styx for an second!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are those goza mats floating on the water?
What on earth...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's King! Are you here to try running on water
too?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm doing this special training where I have to run
across the mats as they're floating.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's your training?! Th-then... those two rows of mats there... Is one of them for me?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, no. That one's for Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But I was just about to get some more mats from
the beach house for you! The trick to running on
water is to plant one foot right before your other
begins to sink...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: D-don't trouble yourself! More importantly...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer looks about ready to faint... Are you
sure this is okay?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Trainer's only fallen into the water
thirty times so far—right, Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is the challenge from hell that we must
overcome together! With grit and guts, we won't
stop until it's finished!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Y-your trainer looks finished, all right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I continue sprinting across the water with
Kawakami Princess until we're able to successfully
complete the challenge.
